items.example: She is in a good mood today because she passed her exam.
My sister is always cheerful in the morning.
He is grumpy when he doesn't get enough sleep.
I feel very stressed about my job interview.
She looked relaxed after her holiday.
Young children are usually very energetic.
I'm so tired, I think I'll go to bed early.
The kids are excited about the trip to the zoo.
I always feel nervous before a test.
A positive attitude can change everything.
